dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry condition interpreted as price closing above the previous candle's high (first candle reference). Exit conditions: stop loss triggered when price closes below previous candle's low, or target reached at absolute price level 463. The signal references support/resistance levels (R1, R2) from source text but uses generic 'first candle' terminology in the rule definition, so prev_high/prev_low used as proxy. Target value of 463 appears to be an absolute price level rather than a percentage-based target.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry condition interpreted as price closing above the previous candle's high (first candle reference). Exit conditions: stop loss triggered when price closes below previous candle's low, or target reached at absolute price level 463. The signal references support/resistance levels (R1, R2) from source text but uses generic 'first candle' terminology in the rule definition, so prev_high/prev_low used as proxy. Target value of 463 appears to be an absolute price level rather than a percentage-based target.

source_rule_text: Enter a long trade when price moves above the first candle with stop loss placed below the candle and a target at a specified level.
